name: Push Up
tip: Keep your body straight and lower your chest to the ground slowly.

name: Squat
tip: Keep your back straight and push your knees outward as you go down.

name: Plank
tip: Keep your hips level and breathe steadily. Hold as long as you can.

name: Pull Up
tip: Grip the bar shoulder-width apart and pull until your chin is above the bar.

name: Lunges
tip: Step forward and lower your back knee close to the ground. Keep your chest up.

name: Bicep Curl
tip: Keep your elbows close to your body and curl slowly for better results.

name: Burpee
tip: Move fast but stay controlled. Great for cardio and strength together.

name: Mountain Climber
tip: Keep your hips down and drive your knees toward your chest quickly.
